title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node.js and modern browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Install via pip install ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Exposes chat, embed, and llm interfaces.

title: ollama-webui (formerly Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted web interface for Ollama. ChatGPT-style UI with admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Simple fluent API with async and streaming support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama. Idiomatic Ruby client with streaming and conversational memory.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with history, syntax highlighting, and themes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for VS Code.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for Ollama generators and chatters.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in open-source replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama backends.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama. Install with nix-env -iA nixpkgs.ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using Ollama models in enterprise workspaces.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: .NET 8 client for Ollama with dependency injection and configuration binding.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio and Serde.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger CI module that caches and serves Ollama models inside pipelines.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for Claude Desktop.
